response.text:
ACCEPT
rationale: r3c2's SoC is 0.10 below your 0.3 threshold (implying ~0.20), matching observed neighbor distress; your 9.5-hour buffer and modest surplus support 0.5 kWh transfer without compromising safety margins.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=balanced, share_min_soc_frac=0.3, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Geographic neighbors are in critical distress (SoC 0.16–0.26); I have modest surplus and 9.5 hours remaining; targeted sharing can prevent neighbor collapse while maintaining my own safety margin..
